text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I'm heading to the track to tidy up<n>after
today's training session...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thanks for training with me today.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's my pleasure, Suzuka. I know you<n>have a
race coming up, so I'd love to<n>help you in any
way I can!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It's been a while sinceI've heard you sing.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, I better make sure I grab a good<n>seat!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, Spe. Can I ask you what you<n>think of your
fans?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Uh, my fans?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Well, I think that since they're<n>rooting for
me, I've really gotta make<n>sure I do the best I
can!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
They make me want to push myself<n>to be faster.
I hope they'll always be<n>cheering for me...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sorry. Not sure if that makes sense or<n>not.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... So, they're people who you<n>really rely on,
then.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah! That's it! I wouldn't be here<n>without them!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...So, what do your fans mean to you?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What do they mean to me? Well...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
They're the ones waiting to see me<n>sing, and
run... and win.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: That's why they're important to me...<n>I guess?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wow. Someone who waits for you,<n>huh? That
sounds absolutely<n>wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And, of course, I'm waiting for you<n>too!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, but aren't we rivals?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but I'm your fan too!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Goodness... But, thanks.
